extortion.description: maliagroup.com zoominfo.com/c/malia-group/347685476 Malia Group is a multifaceted organization comprising 21 companies that operate across six sectors, including consumer goods distribution, technology solutions, fashion, engineering and contracting, and hospitality and real estate. With a strong presence in Lebanon, Iraq, and the UAE, the group is committed to excellence in the creation, production, and timely delivery of goods and services. Over the past 80 years, Malia Group has built a portfolio of 60 brands and established partnerships with 50 leading multinationals, making it a preferred choice in the region. The company promotes cultural and social diversity while fostering an environment of transparency, empowerment, and innovation among its employees
